status_line: Monday 1:41 PM ET / 17:41 UTC — fourteenth hour, and a meaningful one. SARAH Run 125 at 17:07 UTC caught a substantial Downloads cleanup between Run 124 and now: eight of the standing sixteen Open Items disappeared from ~/Downloads — including the entire ROTY-series adopt slate (#12, #12a, #13, #13a, #14, #14a) plus #8 (Process Page spec) and #16 (UUID JPEG). Critically, none of those candidates migrated into the SARAH-owned JARVIS output tree — output/nolan/storyboard/ is still empty, output/nolan/shots/ still holds the same 3 .mov files. Per conservative-attribution policy in force since Run 116, SARAH does not infer disposition from disappearance: closed as RESOLVED-OUT-OF-SCOPE. The policy held — zero risk of misattribution, and if Rick wants any of those back in the pipeline he can re-drop and explicitly adopt. Four new Downloads entries this window: 3 tax/finance PDFs (Underscore Films draft P&L + balance sheet, 2025 expense receipts copy — all out of scope) and 1 ambiguous iPhone HEIC (IMG_2497.heic, 1.83 MB / 12:47 PDT) logged as new Open Item #17 with three disposition options (default-ignore by silence). Carry-forward Open Items #7 (hf video), #9 (directing photos), #15 (outreach CSV) re-verified unchanged. Output tree, Documents, and Desktop top-level all clean. Tray now 9 active (was 16, −8 closed, +1 new). Output tree unchanged at 1,064. JARVIS voice relay still polling clean. No new MAESTRO/WRITER/GUARDIAN/NOLAN/ATLAS/PARK output since the 14:40 push. Lands' End now T-3 days. Macy's + Glossier still parked.
